Off Calendar Aug-28-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF STREAMLINED BUILDING, INC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion by Gregory P. Wayland to withdraw as attorney of record for Streamlined Building Inc. is granted. The court will sign the order on the Judicial Council form.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
